headline: UFC confirms new booking for Alex Pereira's division
body: UFC confirmed a fresh booking that reshapes the light heavyweight title picture around Alex Pereira. Officials noted the matchup would influence the next contender conversation after the upcoming event cycle.

headline: ONE champion hints at quick return after Tokyo win
body: Following the Tokyo event, Anatoly Malykhin suggested he wants a quick turnaround and another major assignment before summer. The post-fight comments immediately fueled matchmaking chatter inside ONE Championship.
